title: Entertainment and Media Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A special way of doing something that is done regularly or at certain times.
choices: ritual
eternal
pagan
rounds.answer: ritual
rounds.explanation: ritual: A special way of doing something that is done regularly or at certain times.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A type of government where a king or queen rules the country.
choices: ritual
eternal
monarchy
rounds.answer: monarchy
rounds.explanation: monarchy: A type of government where a king or queen rules the country.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A perfect place where everything is good and everyone is happy.
choices: eternal
utopia
ritual
rounds.answer: utopia
rounds.explanation: utopia: A perfect place where everything is good and everyone is happy.
